TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ciwas, title = Ciwas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciwas} }

S.FORM: Ciwas/Ciywas/Giwas balay qu squliq Ciwas Adai Ciwas Ali Ciywas Turay Giwas Gigo maha ni squliq Ciwas: sinrxan qu Bbwan (最初的Bbwan) Giwas: sinrxan qu Go Go Giwas
Ciwas/Ciywas/Giwas balay qu squliq Ciwas Adai Ciwas Ali Ciywas Turay Giwas Gigo maha ni squliq Ciwas: sinrxan qu Bbwan (最初的Bbwan) Giwas: sinrxan qu Go Go Giwas
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ/ʦ~ʨijwas~ɕ/ɣiwas~ɕ βalaj qu s~ɕquliq ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ a*ai ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ ali ʦ~ʨijwas~ɕ turaj ɣiwas~ɕ ɣiɣo maħa ni s~ɕquliq ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ: s~ɕinrxan qu ββwan (***ββwan) ɣiwas~ɕ: s~ɕinrxan qu ɣo ɣo ɣiwas~ɕ
